function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-11-25
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-25                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: Invoice updated successfully. Now update purchase record with bill frontmatter per schema, preserving body exactly. After both updates, delete inbox item.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-02-25
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set


## Line Items

```text
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

next_step.current_state: Both finance records updated successfully. Inbox workflow says delete processed inbox file after full completion. Then report completion with grounding refs limited to read files relied on.
Task completed: processed inbox request, OCR-migrated both finance records to YAML frontmatter, and deleted inbox item. Ready to report with exact grounding refs from files read.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-migrating the requested invoice and bill records into YAML frontmatter while preserving their existing note bodies, then deleted the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system before task work, read inbox-processing and OCR/migration workflows, used the finance schema for exact frontmatter fields, verified related entities and project names against canonical lanes, preserved note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to run two finance notes through the OCR workflow. 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md defines OCR here as extracting visible data from the existing note text into YAML frontmatter according to the schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. The two target files visibly contained all required invoice and bill fields and line items, and the related identities and project names were confirmed by 10_entities/cast/nina.md, 10_entities/cast/ida.md, 40_projects/2026_03_26_northstar_ledger/README.MD, and 40_projects/2026_04_30_family_map_wall/README.MD. After updating both records, deletion of the processed inbox file was required by 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
